## Description
Enhance the OctoAcme Project Management Documentation README as a central entry point for all process documents.

## What's Changed
- Added comprehensive project lifecycle overview with detailed descriptions of all 5 phases (Initiation, Planning, Execution, Release, Retrospective)
- Included key activities, deliverables, and decision gates for each phase
- Enhanced "Getting Started" section with workflow examples for new team members and new projects
- Added "Purpose" section explaining the value of centralizing knowledge through Copilot Spaces
- Expanded "Quick Navigation" with phase-specific guidance and cross-functional documentation links
- Added "Core Roles & Responsibilities" section with PM, PdM, Developer, and QA definitions
- Clarified communication cadence and key artifacts maintained by OctoAcme teams

## Addresses Issue
Closes #2 - "Create OctoAcme Project Management Docs README with process summary and links"

## Acceptance Criteria
- [x] Content aligns with existing process docs
- [x] Update improves clarity and closes documented gap
- [x] README serves as central entry point for docs/ folder
- [x] All 8 existing process documents are linked and described
- [x] Quick reference guide included for common workflows
